creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
phplist should be upgraded to 2.10.10

setting this as low priority/ since I can't give you clean patches.
Makefile and distfiles are easy., but:  pkglist is different, and patches wont' apply cleanly.

from


http://forums.phplist.com/viewtopic.php?f=9&t=24494#p61847

This release is aimed at hardening the security in phpList. Several changes have been made to eliminate potential attack vectors.

including potential SQL injection fixes:
http://mantis.phplist.com/view.php?id=15244

I started on some patches, and thought I knew what I was doing (im the ports maintainer for mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.. )

but there are lots of conflicts, some patches applied, and their web site, patch 121 took out patches for 76 and 115 in send_core.php

I have it running, and can send you diffs, but putting them into ../files didn't seem to work.
I had to apply them by hand.
